scripts.install:all: npm run install:web && npm run install:api && npm run install:worker
scripts.dev: start "EvoFlow Web" cmd /k "cd /d C:\EvoFlow\apps\web && npm run dev" && start "EvoFlow API" cmd /k "cd /d C:\EvoFlow\apps\api && npm run dev" && start "EvoFlow Worker" cmd /k "cd /d C:\EvoFlow\workers\executor && npm run dev"
